collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Several fragments of a legal document. Details are difficult to extract. Mentions an inheritance and involves a woman (possibly Siwār, but this could also be read siwā[hā]). In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–38 CE).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
